name: Baked Ham
recipeInstructions:
1. Place the ham, weighing 16-18 pounds, in a roasting pan.
2. In a large bowl, combine 5 cups of water, 1/2 cup of cider vinegar, 2 celery ribs, 2 bay leaves, 1 teaspoon of thyme, 6 whole cloves, 6 whole allspice berries, 2 chopped garlic cloves, and 1 small chopped onion.
3. Pour the mixture over the ham.
4. Preheat the oven to 350°F (175°C).
5. Bake for 3.5 to 4 hours, basting every hour.
6. Remove from the oven and allow to cool; then remove the skin.
7. Sprinkle with 2 cups of light brown sugar, packed firmly. Arrange pineapple slices, whole cloves, watercress, and sprigs of parsley on top.
8. Return to the oven and bake until the sugar browns and dries, around 300°F (150°C) for a few hours.
9. Garnish with watercress or parsley and serve.
